selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 9.2% and 20-day momentum is 27.6%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 12.2% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.5%, downside volatility near 0.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is 40.5% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 8.5% versus SPY over 5 days and 8.7% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.73, confidence 0.74, and 0.7 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.73, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 5 articles across 2 sources, 0.7 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.78, average source quality 0.85, confidence 0.74.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.03).
Overall model score is 0.246 with high confidence.
